tells.name: Unbaselined headline claim
tells.description: A reduction or improvement claim with no baseline value and no baseline year — progress you can't measure against a starting point.

tells.name: Missing or unquantified Scope 3
tells.description: Scope 1/2 emissions are disclosed but Scope 3 (usually the majority of the real footprint) is absent or given no number.

tells.name: Offset-dependent neutrality
tells.description: A 'carbon neutral' / 'net zero today' claim achieved mostly through purchased offsets rather than actual emissions cuts.

tells.name: Long-dated target, no interim milestones
tells.description: A far-off target (e.g. net-zero 2050) with no nearer interim milestone and no stated path to get there.

tells.name: Vague superlative, no number
tells.description: Qualitative bragging — 'industry-leading', 'world-class' — standing in for any measurable performance figure.

tells.name: Goalpost shifting
tells.description: A target present in last year's report is absent or weakened this year (deferred to a later release).

thresholds.label: Improving
thresholds.rule: Exactly 1 Major tell, or 2+ Minor tells with no Major.

thresholds.label: Recommended
thresholds.rule: 0 Major tells and at most 1 Minor tell.

thresholds.label: insufficient-data
thresholds.rule: Extraction failed, report too thin to assess, or all quotes dropped by the verbatim-quote gate. Never collapses to Recommended.
